response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js work shows systems-level capability, but not the specific low-latency, map-tile optimization, or fault-tolerant routing pipeline expertise needed.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Proven ability to work across stacks and adopt new technologies quickly
Strong systems-level experience with async I/O, Kubernetes, and performance-critical apps
concerns: No demonstrated commercial experience with C++ or Rust in routing or geospatial pipelines
Lacks explicit experience with routing tile generation, map data transformation, or navigation QA
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not the required C++/Linux systems focus
